title: Fix black background bleed above Exclusive Pre-Launch badge in Navigation

requirements.summary: Fix visual issue where black background bleeds into or overlaps the 'Exclusive Pre-Launch' badge in the Navigation component, ensuring clean and consistent navbar styling
acceptanceCriteria: No unintended black background area appears above or around the 'Exclusive Pre-Launch' badge in the Navigation bar
The Navigation bar background renders consistently across the full width without color bleed or overlap artifacts
The Pre-Launch badge is fully visible with correct spacing and no surrounding visual glitches
The fix is consistent across desktop and mobile viewports

file_operations.description: Inspect and fix CSS class combinations on the Navigation bar container and the Pre-Launch badge wrapper to eliminate black background bleed. Likely causes include overlapping absolute/relative positioning, z-index conflicts, or misaligned padding/margin creating gaps. Ensure the sticky nav container background is uniform and the badge section has proper spacing without introducing unwanted background layers. Verify the fix works across desktop and mobile breakpoints without affecting scroll behavior or the 'Connect With Us' smooth-scroll functionality.
